info.title: Time Tracking API
info.description: REST API for time tracking, organizations, work schedules, absences and holidays.

get.summary: List absences for the organization with optional filters (members only).

post.summary: Create an absence day for the current user (members only).
Create an absence day for any member (admin only).

delete.summary: Delete an absence day (members only; service enforces ownership rules).

post.summary: Register a new user
Login with email and password
Refresh access token using refresh token
Logout by revoking refresh token
Change password for authenticated user

delete.summary: Delete the authenticated user's account and all associated data

get.summary: Get current authenticated user info

put.summary: Update the current user's profile (name, email).

post.summary: Verify TOTP code to complete login when 2FA is enabled
Begin 2FA setup — generates a TOTP secret and returns the authenticator URI
Confirm 2FA setup by providing a valid TOTP code from the authenticator app
Disable 2FA for the authenticated user (requires current password)

get.summary: List all holidays for an organization (members only).

post.summary: Create a new holiday for the organization (admin only).
Import preset holidays (e.g. German public holidays) for a given year (admin only).

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year to import for. Defaults to current year.

get.summary: List available holiday preset codes.
Get notifications for the current user.

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: When true, return only unread notifications.

get.summary: Get the number of unread notifications.

put.summary: Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read for the current user.

get.summary: List all organizations.

post.summary: Create a new organization.

get.summary: Get organization details by slug. Members see full details including member list; non-members see a limited view.
List organizations the current user belongs to.

post.summary: Add a member to the organization (admin only).

put.summary: Update a member's role in the organization (admin only).

delete.summary: Remove a member from the organization (self-leave or admin).

get.summary: Get time tracking overview for all members (admin only).
Get time entries for a specific member (admin only).

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: Member ID whose entries to retrieve.

put.summary: Set a member's initial overtime hours (admin only).

get.summary: List all pause rules for an organization (members only).

post.summary: Create a new pause rule (admin only).

put.summary: Update an existing pause rule (admin only).

post.summary: Create a new request for the organization (e.g. join, edit entry). No membership required for join requests.

get.summary: List requests for an organization with optional filters (admin only).

put.summary: Accept or decline a pending request (admin only).

get.summary: List the current user's requests across all organizations.
Get pending request notifications for admins.
Get responded request notifications for the current user.

post.summary: Mark request notifications as seen.

requestBody.description: Optional list of specific request IDs to mark. If null, marks all.

post.summary: Start a new time entry (clock in).
Stop the currently running time entry (clock out).

get.summary: Get the currently running time entry, if any.
Get past time entries with optional filters and pagination.
Export time entries as CSV file.
Export a comprehensive daily report for an organization as CSV.
get.description:
Generates a day-by-day summary including target hours from work schedules,
actual worked hours, overtime tracking (cumulative from initial overtime),
holidays, absences (sick/vacation), and individual time entry details.
Defaults to the current month if no date range is specified.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of date range (default: first day of current month).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of date range (default: last day of current month).

get.summary: Get the current user's active work schedule.
List all work schedules for the current user.

post.summary: Create a new work schedule for the current user.

put.summary: Update a work schedule for the current user.

delete.summary: Delete a work schedule for the current user.

put.summary: Update the current user's initial overtime hours.

get.summary: Get a specific member's active work schedule (admin only).
List all work schedules for a specific member (admin only).

post.summary: Create a work schedule for a specific member (admin only).

put.summary: Update a work schedule for a specific member (admin only).

delete.summary: Delete a work schedule for a specific member (admin only).

AbsenceDayResponse.description: Absence day entry (sick day, vacation, etc.).

items.description: The items on the current page.

totalCount.description: Total number of items matching the query (across all pages).

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page.

hasMore.description: Whether more items exist beyond the current page.

AbsenceDayResponsePaginatedResponse.description: Standard paginated response wrapper for list endpoints.

AddMemberRequest.description: Request payload for adding a user to an organization.

AdminCreateAbsenceDayRequest.description: Request payload for an admin to create an absence day for any member.

AdminNotificationResponse.description: Admin notification: pending requests for their orgs

AuthResponse.description: Generic success/failure response for auth operations.

currentPassword.description: The user's current password for verification.

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Request payload for changing the current user's password.

CreateAbsenceDayRequest.description: Request payload for creating a personal absence day.

CreateHolidayRequest.description: Request payload for creating a holiday.

CreateOrgRequestRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new organization request.

CreateOrganizationRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new organization.

minHours.description: Minimum hours worked before this rule triggers.

CreatePauseRuleRequest.description: Request payload for creating a pause rule.

CreateWorkScheduleRequest.description: Request payload for creating a work schedule.

LoginRequest.description: Request payload for logging in with email and password.

expiresAt.description: UTC expiry time of the access token.

LoginResponse.description: Response returned after a successful login or registration.

MemberTimeOverviewResponse.description: Per-member time tracking statistics for the admin overview.

OrgRequestResponse.description: Response representing an organization request (join, edit entry, etc.).

items.description: The items on the current page.

totalCount.description: Total number of items matching the query (across all pages).

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page.

hasMore.description: Whether more items exist beyond the current page.

OrgRequestResponsePaginatedResponse.description: Standard paginated response wrapper for list endpoints.

OrganizationDetailResponse.description: Detailed view of an organization including members, settings and pause rules.

items.description: The items on the current page.

totalCount.description: Total number of items matching the query (across all pages).

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page.

hasMore.description: Whether more items exist beyond the current page.

OrganizationResponsePaginatedResponse.description: Standard paginated response wrapper for list endpoints.

PauseRuleResponse.description: Automatic pause rule (deduct X minutes after Y hours worked).

RefreshTokenRequest.description: Request containing a refresh token (used for refresh and logout).

expiresAt.description: UTC expiry time of the new access token.

RefreshTokenResponse.description: Response returned after a successful token refresh.

RegisterRequest.description: Request payload for registering a new user account.

RuleMode.description:
Tri-state rule mode for organization settings.
Disabled = feature off entirely.
RequiresApproval = user must request, admin approves.
Allowed = user can do it themselves.

SetInitialOvertimeRequest.description: Request payload for setting a member's initial overtime hours.

description.description: Optional description of the work being done.

organizationId.description: Organization ID to track time against (optional).

StartTimeEntryRequest.description: Request payload to start (clock in) a new time entry.

description.description: Optional description to set/update on the entry being stopped.

StopTimeEntryRequest.description: Request payload to stop (clock out) the current time entry.

endTime.description: When the entry ended (UTC), null if still running.

isRunning.description: True if the timer is currently running.

netDurationMinutes.description: Net duration in minutes (gross minus pauses).

TimeEntryResponse.description: Response representing a single time entry.

items.description: The items on the current page.

totalCount.description: Total number of items matching the query (across all pages).

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page.

hasMore.description: Whether more items exist beyond the current page.

TimeEntryResponsePaginatedResponse.description: Standard paginated response wrapper for list endpoints.

code.description: 6-digit TOTP code from the authenticator app to confirm setup.

TwoFactorConfirmRequest.description: Request to confirm and enable 2FA by providing a valid TOTP code.

backupCodes.description: One-time backup codes the user should store securely.

TwoFactorConfirmResponse.description: Response after successfully enabling 2FA, includes one-time backup codes.

sharedKey.description: Base32-encoded shared secret for manual entry.

authenticatorUri.description: otpauth:// URI for scanning as a QR code.

TwoFactorSetupResponse.description: Response returned when setting up 2FA — contains the shared secret and QR URI.

twoFactorToken.description: Temporary token from the login step.

code.description: 6-digit TOTP code from authenticator app, or a backup code.

TwoFactorVerifyRequest.description: Request to verify a TOTP code during login.

UpdateHolidayRequest.description: Request payload for updating a holiday.

UpdateMemberRoleRequest.description: Request payload for changing a member's role.

UpdateOrganizationRequest.description: Request payload for updating an existing organization.

UpdateOrganizationSettingsRequest.description: Request payload for updating org-level settings and policies.

UpdatePauseRuleRequest.description: Request payload for updating a pause rule.

UpdateProfileRequest.description: Request payload for updating the current user's profile.

UpdateTimeEntryRequest.description: Request payload to update an existing time entry.

UpdateWorkScheduleRequest.description: Request payload for updating a work schedule.

UserNotificationResponse.description: User notification: requests that have been responded to

UserOrganizationResponse.description: Lightweight org view from the user's perspective.

WorkScheduleResponse.description: Work schedule defining target hours per weekday.

Bearer.description: Please enter JWT with Bearer into field
